headline: 32 contracts catalogued across Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, and Polygon; core bridge/token infrastructure and cross-chain integrations identified
short_headline: 32 contracts across 5+ EVM chains and non-EVM networks

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search for 'tBTC' and 'Threshold' returned multiple tagged contracts on Ethereum mainnet including Bridge, TBTC token, TBTCVault, WalletRegistry, and supporting infrastructure contracts.

Official deployed contracts documentation found at https://docs.threshold.network/contract-addresses/tbtc and https://docs.threshold.network/resources/contract-addresses/mainnet/tbtc listing Ethereum L1 and L2/other contracts with addresses and roles.

Nine audit reports reviewed from https://docs.threshold.network/resources/security-audits covering tBTC bridge, staking, integrations, and cross-chain updates from firms: Defense by Thesis, Certora, MixBytes, Zellic, Hashlock, Thesis Defense, Least Authority, CertiK, ChainSecurity (dates 2021-2025).

GitHub repository https://github.com/threshold-network identified with tbtc-v2 main source code repository; release documentation indicates StarkNet and other cross-chain deployment addresses with commit hashes.
Multi-chain enumeration across Ethereum, Arbitrum One, Base, Optimism, Polygon PoS, Solana, Starknet, and Sui with distinct contract addresses per chain documented in official deployments page.

Bridge and WalletRegistry are core contracts with wallet rotation mechanics (51-of-100 ECDSA multisigs); factory-pattern wallet enumeration deferred to full contract analysis (capped at 50 per factory per protocol).

Role assignments: Bridge (bridge), TBTC token (token), TBTCVault (vault), WalletRegistry (registry), RandomBeacon (oracle), Governor Bravo Timelock (timelock), L1BitcoinDepositor (other), VendingMachine (factory), RedemptionWatchtower (guardian), CoveragePool (pool).
All discovered addresses traced to official documentation URLs; no snippet-only sightings recorded in admin_addresses.

rationale.verdict: Discovery slice enumerated contracts across pinned chains (Ethereum, multi-chain L2s) via official docs (D2 primary), audit reports (D3), and GitHub (D4). Core tBTC v2 bridge infrastructure, token contracts, and cross-chain gateways catalogued with roles and actor classes inferred from contract naming and documentation context.

evidence.shows: Nine audit reports from 2021-2025 by Defense by Thesis, Certora, MixBytes, Zellic, Hashlock, Thesis Defense, and Least Authority covering tBTC bridge, staking, and cross-chain integrations

Ethereum mainnet deployed contracts: Bridge 0x5e4861a80B55f035D899f66772117F00FA0E8e7B, T Token 0xCdF7028ceAB81fA0C6971208e83fa7872994beE5, TBTC 0x18084fbA666a33d37592fA2633fD49a74DD93a88, TBTCVault 0x9C070027cdC9dc8F82416B2e5314E11DFb4FE3CD, WalletRegistry 0x46d52E41C2F300BC82217Ce22b920c34995204eb, Governor Bravo Timelock 0x87F005317692D05BAA4193AB0c961c69e175f45f, RandomBeacon 0x5499f54b4A1CB4816eefCf78962040461be3D80b

L2/Multi-chain contracts: ArbitrumTBTC 0x6c84a8f1c29108F47a79964b5Fe888D4f4D0dE40, L1BitcoinDepositor (Arbitrum) 0x75A6e4A7C8fAa162192FAD6C1F7A6d48992c619A, L1BitcoinDepositor (Base) 0x186D048097c7406C64EfB0537886E3CaE100a1fe, and listing of Optimism, Polygon, Solana, Starknet, Sui integrations

Official website referencing GitHub at https://github.com/threshold-network, governance forum at https://forum.threshold.network/, documentation at https://docs.threshold.network/, bug bounty at https://immunefi.com/bug-bounty/thresholdnetwork/information/

tBTC v2 primary repository with architecture: Random Beacon and Sortition Pool generate 51-of-100 threshold ECDSA Bitcoin wallets; youngest wallet accepts deposits, oldest serves redemptions; Bank balance minted to tBTC ERC-20 token

StarkNet integration contracts: Proxy 0xC9031f76006da0BD4bFa9E02aDf0d448dB3BC155, Implementation 0xD3585922B7F6B30953Fc81726F48046826B8B2CA, ProxyAdmin 0x890d38c664dbB584b524b1b9417a28d4355F67d4; Timelock security hardening for Bridge, WalletRegistry, RedemptionWatchtower with Threshold Council as scheduler/executor
Official documentation hub; tBTC Bitcoin bridge, T token governance, contract API references, and deployed address indices per chain

unknowns: D6: Factory-enumerated wallet children deferred (51-of-100 ECDSA wallets rotate bi-weekly; full enumeration cost prohibitive; WalletRegistry enumerates via on-chain call in downstream slices)

protocol_metadata.about: tBTC is a decentralized Bitcoin bridge powered by Threshold Network's threshold cryptography. Users deposit Bitcoin and receive an ERC-20 token (tBTC v2) backed 1:1, secured by rotating 51-of-100 ECDSA multisig wallets operated by independent node operators. The protocol spans Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, Polygon, Solana, Starknet, and Sui, enabling permissionless Bitcoin participation in DeFi.
